name: SKELETON_TECHNOLOGYCLASS1__MEMBER_LOOKUP__ASSIGNEE__ALL_TIME
description: Independent frame skeleton for discovering assignees constrained by TechnologyClass1.
cypher_template:
MATCH (tc:TechnologyClass1 {name: $technologyclass1})<-[:HAS_TECHNOLOGY_CLASS1]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, targetpair_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10
examples: Which companies are involved in Trans-Bridging Immune Engagers target-pair combinations?
Which assignees have patents in the Tumor-Intrinsic Control TechnologyClass1 category?
Please list the companies involved in Other functional combination target-pair combinations.
